name: Banana Molasses Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the bananas until no lumps remain.
2. Add the unbeaten egg and mix well.
3. Beat in the sugar, molasses, and shortening until very smooth.
4. Sift together the flour, baking powder, soda, and salt.
5. Fold the dry mixture into the liquid mixture until moistened and no streaks remain.
6. Spoon the batter into a muffin tin sprayed with non-stick coating.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until done.
8. Serve warm.
